part.Name: UD_Bones_MoonKingAnnouncer
part.Title: =subject.A.RegalTitle= Persists!
part.Message: =subject.Subjective= will tolerate neither pretenders nor would-be-usurpers!
part.MadMessage: =subject.Subjective==subject.verb:'ve:afterpronoun= =subject.verb:come:afterpronoun= from a world vastly different from this one, and =FeverWarped:will tolerate neither pretenders nor would-be-usurpers!=
